creator: outcast@globetrotter.net
text:
Greetings,

I'm sorry to have to send the keymap again but there was a tiny
error left. I had a '3' instead of a 'e' which maked it impossible
to do 'ë'. I don't know how I could have typed 3 instead of e but
I promise I'll be more attentive next time.

Alexandre Normand
outcast@globetrotter.net
